- [ ] ...

## Definition of Done Checklist

- [ ] Unit tests pass (≥ 80% coverage on new code)
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] `/healthz` still returns `{"status": "ok"}`
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets (security scan passes)
- [ ] Docs updated in same PR
- [ ] `docs/SOVEREIGN_SCRUM.md` story marked ✅ with evidence anchor
- [ ] `docs/ACTION_LOG.md` updated with execution timestamp and result

**In scope:**
- ...

**Out of scope:**
- ...

## Technical Notes

<!-- Any implementation guidance, constraints, or ADR references -->

## Priority

- [ ] 🔴 CRITICAL — blocking, must be in next sprint
- [ ] 🟡 HIGH — resolve within current sprint
- [ ] 🟢 LOW — backlog
